settings.heading_r: 2x4 FORTIFIED WOOD CONSTRUCTION MADE FOR GYMS - EXTRA STRONG, HEAVY USERS
settings.text_title_r: For the heavy duty gym users, we want our clients to enjoy the medical benefits of our saunas all year round. so we made our doors thicker and stronger for durability.

In commercial saunas the floor is the first thing to be damaged.Thats why instead of having wood every 10 inches, we reinforce the floors and have heavy duty wood every 1 inch. This means we use 10 times more wood but it is worth it to avoid any issues.

settings.heading_r: BACKED BY 48 DOCTORS,CHIROPRACTORS, PHYSICAL THERAPISTS, SURGEONS
settings.text_title_r: Enjoy free branding with 48 doctors - use their endorsements on our site to promote your sauna.
Unlike the standard 77-inch tall saunas offered by our competitors, our commercial models distinguish themselves with a height of 86 inches. They comfortably accommodate individuals up to 6'8".

settings.heading_r: EXTRA LONG ERGONOMIC 31-INCH TALL BUILT-IN BACKREST
settings.text_title_r: Going beyond the usual 12-inch sauna backrests, we decided a spacious 31-inch, Others may charge $500 for this feature, but we believe in providing a high level of comfort as a standard in our saunas.

settings.heading_r: 31-INCH CHROME EASY CLEAN HANDLE W/WASHABLE COVER
settings.text_title_r: Cleaning saunas can be challenging, but not with ours. Our commercial-grade handles are designed for easy maintenance and, measuring at 31 inches, they outsize the typical 12-inch handles found in many sauna.

At Medical Saunas, we've tackled this challenge head-on by designing our saunas from the ground up, incorporating Natural Red Cedar known for its medicinal and structural attributes. This wood also matures and strengthens over time, ensuring our saunas become even more durable as they age.
A sauna is about relaxation and rejuvenation, not frustration. We upgraded our sauna construction with clasp together technology so you can have the most seamless of sauna assembly.
Tempered glass emerges as the prime choice when prioritizing strength, thermal resilience, and safety as important factors.
Experience the difference with our heat-resistant speaker systems designed to transform every session into an oasis of meditative music.

settings.heading: INCLUDED IN PRICE (+ all features of commercial 485™ features 1-10)

settings.text_title_r: While our competitors' saunas may cost as much as $1000 per month, our saunas boast our proprietary Extreme Energy-Efficient Heating System™. This system uses only 25% of the power compared to competitors, potentially reducing your electric bill to between $50 and $250 and ensuring significant savings. In the first year alone, you could save thousands of dollars by choosing our saunas.

settings.heading_r: ULTRA FULL SPECTRUM HEATERS™THAT HEATS UP 2X FASTER - PAIN RELIEF
settings.text_title_r: Many full-spectrum saunas release waves at one end of the spectrum, limiting their healing benefits. However, our Ultra Full Spectrum heaters offer one of the widest ranges of wavelengths seen in commercial saunas, designed for deeper skin penetration. This feature also conveniently allows the sauna to heat up 2x faster than standard models.

In many saunas, slow heating systems hinder the recommended warm up and cool down rounds essential for hot/cold therapy's health benefits. Medical Sauna™ addresses this with our potent Rapid Internal Heating System™, enablingeffective hot/cold therapy for enhanced muscle relaxation and flexibility.

Our Oxygen Ion Sanitation System™ works tirelessly to clear away dust, bacteria, pollen, and other allergens to make the air you breathe pure and safe, so you can relax and enjoy your sauna experience without any worries

While other saunas claim to remove some toxins, our commericial line™ specializes in eliminating more harmful ones including heavy metals, phthalates, and other substances often found in daily life. Our Detox Routine enlarges skin pores to flush out these toxins to help you become healthier.

Poorly designed saunas often encounter unwanted temperature fluctuations, we've engineered a solution that works seamlessly with our advanced heating system maintaining your sauna at the perfect temperature with less effort while receiving the maximum performance.

Unlike other sauna companies that rely on outdated CDs and audio jacks, we've embraced innovation to enhance your sauna experience. Our saunas feature Bluetooth technology, allowing you to effortlessly control the ambiance with a full set of relaxing spa music. We believe in offering you complete control over your relaxation journey, ensuring a seamless and modern spa experience.

Many sauna companies lack surround heat in their saunas, as it involves developing a specialized motherboard that costs over $700,000 to engineer. However, at MedicalSaunas, we invested the time and resources to manufacture saunas with surround heat, ensuring your entire body is engulfed in heat therapy. Our saunas are equipped with multiple heating elements in the front, back, sides, and even under your legs, offering you a 4D Heat Therapy Experience unseen in any other sauna

settings.heading: INCLUDED IN PRICE (+ all features of commercial 486™ features 11-18)

settings.text_title_r: Many saunas provide even heat throughout, which can make it unbearable to stay in for an extended period of time. We've read several reviews from other companies that list complaints about overheating lower extremities. That's why we've introduced omnidirectional heat in our design, creating lower heat around your feet and higher heat around your back. This allows the heat to cycle around the sauna, giving you the optimal spa experience.

In commercial saunas the floor is the first thing to be damaged.Thats why instead of having wood every 10 inches, we reinforce the floors and have heavy duty wood every 1 inch. This means we use 10 times more wood but it is worth it to avoid any issues.We've included Red Light Therapy in our commercial line, as it's rapidly gaining popularity within the medical community. Ideal for skin health, this cutting-edge therapy helps provide a multitude of benefits, such as reducing wrinkles and acne, enhancing energy and performance, accelerating recovery, boosting mental clarity, and so much more.

Many other sauna companies have decided what comfort means in a sauna, but we believe that standard was set too low for our customers. Therefore, we've expanded the interior space by an extra 25% in our saunas, ensuring that you can truly lounge in comfort during your daily session.

Mental health is crucial, as it can significantly influence one's day. That's why we've integrated chromatic light therapy into our saunas. Coupled with the medical features of our commericial line, this sauna not only offers healing benefits but also positively improves your mood.

Some saunas can be noisy, making it challenging to meditate or truly relax. That's why we designed our saunas with the latest noise-proof technology, ensuring every powerbox, heater, and motherboard operates silently. Experience the ultimate tranquility, allowing you to fully relax and heal in peace.

settings.heading_r: DEEP BENCH SEATING FOR EXTRA COMFORT™
settings.text_title_r: Airplane seats, usually 15 inches wide, are known for being extremely uncomfortable, and believe it or not, many sauna benches are also this size. To enhance comfort in your sauna, we've added seats that are 25% deeper which ensures that even if you have a customer who is big and tall, they can fit and relax comfortably.

While reading lights are a common feature in saunas, they often aren't suited for commercial use. When used for eight hours a day, these lights tend to flicker and require frequent replacement due to their inability to handle the heat. In stark contrast, our commercial-grade, heat-resistant lights are designed to withstand both high temperatures and heavy use without any issues, providing a more reliable and convenient experience.

settings.heading: INCLUDED IN PRICE (+ all features of commercial 487™ features 19-25)

settings.text_title_r: Many saunas provide even heat throughout, which can make it unbearable to stay in for an extended period of time. We've read several reviews from other companies that list complaints about overheating lower extremities. That's why we've introduced omnidirectional heat in our design, creating lower heat around your feet and higher heat around your back. This allows the heat to cycle around the sauna, giving you the optimal spa experience.

settings.heading_r: THE WORLD'S FIRST HEAT RESISTANTAndroid Android Tablet™
settings.text_title_r: If your clients bring their phone into a sauna, it's going to overheat and get damaged. They will not gain any medical benefits in just ten minutes, they must be in a sauna for 30 minutes to an hour. That's why we invented the world's first heat-resistant Android tablet. You're going to be one of the first sauna studios to have a patent-pending heat-resistant Android tablet that will allow them to watch Hulu, Netflix, and YouTube in a sauna, helping them get healthier more easily.

settings.heading_r: ON/OFF SWITCH FOR EACHFULL SPECTRUM HEATER™
settings.text_title_r: Unlike other companies that keep their heaters on constantly, we added an on/off switch to every full spectrum heater so you can turn them off individually when not in use. This not only conserves energy but also offers greater control over the sauna experience.

To accommodate as many clients as possible, we've added stadium seating to allow double the number of customers. If relaxation is the goal, our stadium seating design allows two people to lay down and relax, or it can comfortably host eight people in the sauna at the same time.

settings.heading_r: 36 INCH WIDE DOOR FOR EASY ACCESS™
settings.text_title_r: While many saunas come with standard 22-inch doors, we've raised the bar. Our saunas are designed with a generous 36-inch door for easy entry and exit.

settings.heading_r: 31-INCH CHROME EASY CLEAN HANDLE W/WASHABLE COVER

settings.yt_video_head: Medical benefits of a Medical Sauna™
settings.yt_video_content_top: Sauna usage has become increasingly popular over the last several years, as evidenced by Google trends. Respected cardiologist Dr. Jari Laukkanen, alongside experts such as Dr. Rhonda Patrick, PhD, and renowned nutritionist Thomas DeLauer, have emphasized the many potential health advantages of sauna therapy. These benefits are bolstered by companies like Medical Sauna™, which worked with over 48 doctors to construct a medical-grade facility for customers. Regular sessions in these medical saunas can help reduce risks of cardiovascular diseases, stroke, dementia, and even Alzheimer's, as well as boost blood circulation, aid muscle recovery, and provide pain relief. Adding a commercial Medical Spa to your business not only supports your community in establishing a healthy daily sauna routine but also promotes a lifestyle that offers comprehensive care for one's mental, physical, and emotional well-being.

settings.heading: CUSTOMER
settings.textcontent: To help you decide for yourself how effective Medical Saunas are, we have listed REAL, UNCENSORED, UNEDITED reviews, emails and comments from customers who have paid for and used Medical Saunas™.
